reviews.comment:

Great service, everything well organized and very clean, it has a small park, ideal for stopping for a while on the trip and recharging your batteries 😉

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar. Buena atención; baños limpios y cómodos y se puede llenar el termo con agua caliente, siendo este un servicio gratuito... Cosa que no es muy común.
Excelente. Lo súper recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop. Good service; clean and comfortable bathrooms; and free hot water refills... which isn't very common.
Excellent. I highly recommend it.
